title: Canva appoints former Airbnb finance chief as CFO
snippet: Canva appointed a new chief financial officer as the design software company prepares for its next phase of growth.

title: Canva expands board with independent director
snippet: Canva announced an independent director joins board, adding public-market experience.

title: Stripe discusses secondary sale with investors
snippet: Stripe is discussing a secondary sale process with investors while monitoring market conditions for an IPO.

title: Databricks hires banks for potential listing

title: Bolt expands hiring in payments and delivery
snippet: Bolt has accelerated hiring across payments and delivery but did not comment on transaction plans.

title: Checkout.com explores strategic alternatives
snippet: Checkout.com is exploring strategic alternatives after inbound acquisition interest from financial sponsors.

title: Anduril raises new growth investment

title: Northvolt in debt restructuring talks

title: Razorpay appoints CFO with IPO experience
